SessionStart.windows: New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force logs | Out-Null; Add-Content -Path logs/copilot-session.log -Value "Session started: $(Get-Date -Format 'ddd MMM dd HH:mm:ss K yyyy')"

Stop.windows: New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force logs | Out-Null; Add-Content -Path logs/copilot-session.log -Value "Session ended: $(Get-Date -Format 'ddd MMM dd HH:mm:ss K yyyy')"
